ab: Pakamaan kiso a tayra i talo’an?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Pakapaliding kako a tayra i talo’an.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Pakamaan cira a tayra i paisingan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Rakat sanay cira tayra i paisingan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Pakamaan kiso a tayra i Pongho?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Pakahikoki kako tayra i Pongho.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Pakamaan kiso a tayra i Pongho?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Pakatamina kako tayra i Pongho.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Pakamaan kiso a minokay?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Pakaci^in kako minokay.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Pakamaan ci Panay a talakongkoan?
en: How does Panay  go to school?

ab: Pakasi’acefelay ci Panay a talakongkoan.
en: Panay goes to school by train.

ab: Pakamaan ci Kacaw a talakiwkay?
en: How does Kacaw go to church?

ab: Sitingsa sanay ci Kacaw a talakiwkay.
en: Kacaw  goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Pakaci^in kiso a talakongkoan haw?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Cowa, pakapaso kako a talakongkoan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Pakatingsa kiso a talakongkoan haw?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Hai, pakatingsa kako a talakongkoan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: PakaKawti kiso a talaTakaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Hai, pakaKawti kako a talaTakaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: O si’acefelay anca o hikoki ko nikalican iso a talaPosong?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: O hikoki ko nikalican ako, kalikiay ko hikoki to si’acefelay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Pakapaso anca pakapaliding kiso a talakiwkay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Pakapaliding kako talakiwkay, pakapaliding ko madepocay to pakapaso.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Mangataay ko loma’ namo to cifa haw?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Cowa kangata, siotofayay kako a talacifa.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去市場。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Mangataay ko yofing to kongkoan haw?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Mangataay, rakat sa tahiraay to.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Mangataay no siyataw ko kakomaenan haw?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Mahadak i siyataw lima a fon ko karomakat tahiraay to.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
